mapper.select: SELECT TOKEN_DATE as tokenDate , CONNECT_LOC as connectLoc , ACCESS_TOKEN as accessToken , EXPIRES_IN as expiresIn , SCOPE as scope , TOKEN_ID as tokenId , USE_YN as useYn , VARCHAR_FORMAT(REGISTTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as registTime FROM MA3_MYDATA_API_TOKEN WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND SCOPE = #{scope}
